title: YoshMC
description: A Client-side performance and QOL Fabric Modpack
body:
YoshMC is a client-side performance and quality of life modpack.

# **Features**

- Minimap
- Better Performance
- Better Menus
- Connected Textures
- High quality textures*
- Outlined Ores
- A Better Looking Sky*
- Shader support*
- And more!

# **Performance Comparison****

- Vanilla:
![29 FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0288f5b28f249f49cb3001c826e461cd916e28a1_0.webp)
- OptiFine:
![51 FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/128b85e122fdfff7344c4af9ea5beaec6f1691af.png)
- YoshMC***:
![69 FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e80836487ac155d3afbed6c21096880d2e9e0f3.png)

# **Credits**
Modpack made by SuperYosh23, member of Unprepared Studios.
All of the mods and resource packs included are linked in the "Dependancies" section of the latest release.

# **Asterisks**
- *Not in YoshMC Lite
- **on Windows 10 Pro Intel core i5 with integrated graphics and 32gb Ram
- ***YoshMC Ultra with Relumination shaders
